channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Rwanda Strengthens Trade Ties Through Tanga Port
item.description: Rwanda has officially confirmed its strong commercial partnership with Tanzania’s Tanga Port, recognising the port as a key gateway for its imports and exports. During a high-level visit, Rwanda’s Hig...

item.title: Trump and Vance Push Railroad Provisions in Highway Bill Amid GOP Division
item.description: President Donald Trump and Vice President JD Vance are advocating for amendments to the five-year highway reauthorization bill that would include the Rail Safety Act, mandating two-person freight trai...

item.title: Atong Ang's Lawyer Meets Families of Missing Cockfight Participants, Provides Financial Assistance
item.description: The lawyer of businessman Charlie “Atong” Ang, Caroline Cruz, confirmed that she met with relatives of the missing sabungeros on April 20. Cruz clarified that the families themselves initiated the mee...

item.title: Tamil Nadu Chief Minister Vijay expands Cabinet with 23 new Ministers, including Congress members
item.description: On 21st May 2026, Chief Minister C. Joseph Vijay of the Tamilaga Vettri Kazhagam (TVK) expanded his Cabinet in Tamil Nadu by inducting 23 new members, including two Congress MLAs. This marks the Congr...

item.title: Toronto and Vancouver drivers prepare for heavy traffic during the World Cup
item.description: In anticipation of the World Cup bringing roughly 650,000 visitors to Toronto and Vancouver in June and July, taxi and ride-hailing drivers are preparing for increased traffic and stressed passengers....

item.title: Thailand reduces visa-free stay for Australians from 60 to 30 days
item.description: Australians planning a trip to Thailand should note that the Thai government has rolled back the visa-free stay period from 60 days to 30 days for Australian visitors. This change, effective immediate...

item.title: PM Shehbaz Encourages Deeper Collaboration with AKDN in Pakistan
item.description: ISLAMABAD: Prime Minister Shehbaz Sharif hosted a breakfast meeting with Prince Rahim Aga Khan V at PM House, warmly welcoming him on his first official visit to Pakistan. During the meeting, PM Shehb...

item.title: Israeli treatment of detained flotilla activists raises serious legal and humanitarian concerns
item.description: A video posted by Israeli National Security Minister Itamar Ben-Gvir showing detained activists kneeling with their hands bound and being dragged by Israeli forces has sparked international outrage. T...

item.title: The Meaning Behind Agusan del Sur’s 2026 Palarong Pambansa Logo
item.description: Agusan del Sur will host the 66th edition of the Palarong Pambansa in 2026, and its official logo highlights the province’s rich cultural heritage. The event is branded as “Palaro Tu AgSur,” with the ...

item.title: Toronto and Vancouver ride-hailing drivers prepare for increased World Cup traffic and passenger demand
item.description: As the World Cup draws international soccer fans to Toronto and Vancouver, ride-hailing and taxi drivers in Canada are gearing up for increased traffic and heightened passenger impatience. About 650,0...

item.title: Where the Cast of Coyote Ugly Are Today, 26 Years Later
item.description: Coyote Ugly, released over 25 years ago, captured audiences with its vibrant depiction of a New York bar and a cast full of emerging stars. The film followed Violet Sanford, played by Piper Perabo, a ...

item.title: Calls for Royal Commission into Femicide After Sydney Triple Murder Spark Debate
item.description: A recent alleged triple murder in south-west Sydney, involving a woman and her two children, has reignited calls for a royal commission into femicide in Australia. A 47-year-old man has been charged w...

item.title: Segun Aina Appointed Youngest JAMB Registrar, Brings Tech Expertise to Board
item.description: President Bola Tinubu don appoint Segun Aina as di new registrar of JAMB, wey go take over from Is-haq Oloyede when hin tenure finish for July 31, 2026. Aina, wey be 39 years old, dey make history as ...

item.title: Governor Dikko Umar Radda Wins APC Ticket for 2027 Katsina Governorship Election
item.description: Governor Dikko Umar Radda don officially secure the All Progressives Congress (APC) governorship ticket for Katsina State as e emerge winner for the party primary ahead of the 2027 election. The prima...

item.title: Njoro Police Arrest Suspect in Grade Six Girl Murder
item.description: In Njoro, Nakuru County, police arrested a young man on the night of May 20, 2026, suspected of murdering a Grade Six girl in Lari. According to Njoro Deputy County Commissioner Mokin Ptanguny, the su...

item.title: Power Grid in Visayas Placed Under Yellow Alert on May 21 Due to High Demand
item.description: The Visayas power grid has been placed under yellow alert on May 21, 2026, according to the National Grid Corporation of the Philippines (NGCP). A yellow alert indicates that electricity supply is app...

item.title: EFTA Corporate Bond Raises Double Target, Signaling Investor Confidence
item.description: A corporate bond issued by Equity for Tanzania (EFTA) has received overwhelming interest from investors, raising over 33 billion Tanzanian shillings—more than twice its original target of 15 billion. ...

item.title: Israel releases and deports foreign activists detained during Gaza-bound flotilla
item.description: On Thursday, Israel confirmed that it had deported all foreign activists detained during the recent Gaza-bound flotilla mission following strong global reactions over their treatment. Israel’s Foreign...

item.title: Eleven NHS staff dismissed and fourteen sanctioned for accessing stabbing victims’ medical records
item.description: Nottingham University Hospitals Foundation Trust has dismissed 11 staff members and sanctioned 14 others for improperly accessing the medical records of victims from the June 2023 Nottingham stabbing ...

item.title: Trump Administration's IRS Settlement and Its Implications for Accountability
item.description: The article reports on a highly controversial IRS settlement orchestrated during the Trump administration, describing it as a $1.776 billion fund allegedly intended to reward individuals who claim to ...
